summary: Tokenized real-world assets (RWA) on-chain — excluding fiat stablecoins — grew from roughly $5B in 2022 to about $15.2B at end-2024, ~$20B at end-2025, ~$25B by March 2026, and to about $32.6B of distributed value by mid-June 2026 (per RWA.xyz). The growth has been led by tokenized US Treasuries (money-market funds) and private/tokenized credit. Tokenized US Treasuries went from ~$845M at end-2023 to ~$7.45B all-time-high in Aug 2025, crossed $10B by Feb 2026, and reached ~$14.95B distributed value by mid-June 2026. The largest single products by mid-2026 are Circle's USYC (~$3.07B, ex-Hashnote, acquired Jan 2025), BlackRock's BUIDL (~$2.37B, launched Mar 2024 via Securitize), and Ondo USDY (~$2.15B); Franklin Templeton's BENJI/iBENJI together ~$2.4B. Tokenized/distributed private credit was ~$6.14B (mid-June 2026) in transferable token form, though active on-chain private loans tracked by RWA.xyz exceed $18-19B (much of it Figure's home-equity lending, and Maple/Centrifuge in DeFi-native credit). Note unit conventions: RWA.xyz distinguishes 'distributed' value (tokens actually held on-chain) from 'represented' value (larger reference/AUM figures); figures here use distributed/on-chain value unless noted. Confidence is medium-high for 2023-2026 (RWA.xyz/CoinGecko/DefiLlama); lower for 2020-2022 where on-chain RWA was nascent and dominated by early private-credit pools.

series.label: Total tokenized RWA value on-chain (excluding fiat stablecoins)

points.note: Approximate; on-chain RWA nascent, mostly early private-credit pools (Centrifuge, Maple, Goldfinch). Low confidence, order-of-magnitude estimate.
~$5B total non-stablecoin tokenized RWA (cited as growth from ~$5B in 2022). Private credit was the dominant category before tokenized Treasuries scaled. Medium-low confidence.
End-2023 roughly flat ~$5B; tokenized Treasuries still small (~$845M) while private-credit pools had contracted from 2022 peak. Medium-low confidence.
End-2024: ~$15.2B excluding stablecoins, up ~85% YoY, per RWA.xyz (data collected Jan 2025). Treasuries +179%, private credit +40%, commodities +5% in 2024.
Reference point: CoinDesk/RWA.xyz cite ~$6.4B 'a year earlier' than March 2026 — this appears to use a narrower category definition than the $15.2B EOY2024 figure; included to show source variance.
End-2025: RWAs hit the $20B mark (RWA.xyz / The Defiant). Some sources cite ~$18.6B excl. stablecoins in Dec 2025.
Crossed $25B by March 2026, nearly quadrupling year-over-year, per RWA.xyz via CoinDesk. Six categories above $1B.
As of 2026-06-16: $32.61B distributed asset value on-chain (RWA.xyz homepage), ex-stablecoins. Current value and approximate all-time high.

series.label: Tokenized US Treasuries total value on-chain

points.note: ~$114M market cap in January 2023 (CoinGecko). Start-of-year baseline.
Crossed $1B in tokenized US Treasury notes on public blockchains (CoinDesk, Mar 2024), coinciding with BlackRock BUIDL launch.
End-2024 estimate; Treasuries grew ~179% in 2024 off the ~$845M base (RWA.xyz / Tokenized Asset Coalition State of Tokenization 2024). Medium confidence.
All-time high of $7.45B in August 2025 after a July correction (CryptoSlate).
~$7.3B reported for 2025 (Yellow.com); ~$8.86B reported by RWA.xyz on 2025-12-29 across 62 products / 59,023 holders (higher definition).
Surpassed $10B for the first time (Arkham, Feb 2026).

As of 2026-06-16: $14.95B distributed value across 82 products, ~65,978 holders (RWA.xyz/treasuries). Current value and approximate all-time high. (Live 2026-06-18 ≈ $15.01B, 82 products, 66,023 holders.)

series.label: Tokenized / on-chain private credit (transferable token, distributed value)

points.note: End-2024 order-of-magnitude; private credit grew ~40% in 2024 (Tokenized Asset Coalition). Low-medium confidence on exact figure.

RWA.xyz: active on-chain private credit exceeded $18.91B; cumulative originations ~$33.66B. NOTE: this counts active LOANS (incl. Figure's ~$9.5B home-equity book), not just transferable tokens — only ~12% is in transferable tokenized form.

As of 2026-06-16: $6.14B distributed (transferable on-chain) tokenized credit value; $21.17B represented value; 2,406 assets, 183,227 holders (RWA.xyz/private-credit). (Live 2026-06-18 ≈ $6.12B distributed / $23.44B represented, 183,203 holders.)
